concerns.text: Spec Edge Case 3 ('LLM model exceeds 6-hour GitHub Actions job time limit') has no corresponding task. T033 handles test suite timeout, not LLM inference timeout during participant sessions.
Constitution Principle VII requires secure deletion of participant data after analysis. T053 covers anonymization/encryption but lacks explicit task for implementing secure deletion workflow.
Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/. T021 logs seeds but has no explicit task to pin them in implementation for reproducibility.
Constitution Principle III requires checksums recorded in state file artifact_hashes map. T056 verifies checksums but lacks task to write them to state file.
Constitution Principle V requires artifact changes update state file updated_at timestamp. T055 creates metadata.yaml but lacks task to update state file timestamp.

Constitution Principle VI requires exact dataset versions (commit hash/API snapshot) recorded in data/metadata.yaml. T009/T010 verify URLs but lack explicit task to capture version information before T055 creates metadata.

T011 marks JaCoText source gap as BLOCKING, yet T023 schedules JaCoText implementation without confirming gap resolution. Internal consistency violation between blocking dependency and parallel task scheduling.
FR-001 requires ≥95% successful problem loading rate. T015 implements problem loading but lacks explicit task to measure/verify the loading rate metric.
SC-004 requires multiple-comparison correction measured against family-wise error rate ≤0.05. T040/T041 implement correction methods but lack verification task for error rate validation.
Plan states StarCoder can be used for both languages if JaCoText unavailable, but tasks lack conditional fallback logic for model selection.
FR-013 specifies JaCoText for Java and StarCoder for Python. T012 verifies StarCoder size ≤1GB but lacks equivalent verification task for JaCoText model size/CPU tractability.
